title: Benefits Enrollment: Health Insurance and Dental Options
text:
Q: How do I enroll in health insurance and dental options?
A: Employees can enroll in health insurance and dental options during the annual open enrollment period or within 30 days of a qualifying life event, such as marriage or the birth of a child. To begin the enrollment process, log into the employee portal and navigate to the benefits section. There, you will find detailed information about the available health and dental plans, including coverage options and costs. After selecting your preferred plans, complete the online enrollment form and submit it for processing. If you have any questions or need assistance, please contact the HR department or your benefits coordinator. Remember, timely enrollment is crucial to ensure you have coverage when you need it.
